ab: lokah cimu qabax. tgaring ta lay.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: tuliq tmatuk tunux mamu.
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: sesiy lokah.
en: B: Hello.

ab: tama.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: lokah cimu qabax. kisa ga, sbaqun cimu kmayan ke na nniqun na Tayal qani.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的泰雅語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Thai.

ab: baqun mamu mung ke na sesiy ga.
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sesiy, ini mu kbaqi mung. ana su kmayan min qutux loyi.
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ini mu pungi ke su, tyaba hayi kmayan ke su ga?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: ktayux cqani! glux kingan kmayan min qutux.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: blaq calay qa lpxan mamu.
en: It’s very well read.

ab: lpux min qutux loyi. tyaba hayi ke mamu.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: ta kcyang. laxi kayan.
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: agan qa biru pqwasan mamu.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: uya, sesiy.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: agan enpit mamu.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: sesiy, wal mu kngyan maray enpit mu la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: agan ccom mamu.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: sesiy, wal mu kngyan maray ccom mu la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: ksiyux cikay ccom qa seto su.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: ksyugay ta cikay ccom su ga?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: hngaw ta mqwas biru la.
en: Class is over.

ab: tqbaq ta ski cqai ha, tqbaqay ta babaw nya la.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下次再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
